items.original_text: Large language models are trained in two stages: (1) unsupervised pretraining from raw text, to learn general-purpose representations, and (2) large-scale instruction tuning and reinforcement learning, to better align to end tasks and user preferences.
items.claim_text: LLM训练分为预训练和指令对齐两阶段，预训练学习通用表示，指令对齐优化任务和用户偏好 [EV-001]

items.original_text: We measure the relative importance of these two stages by training LIMA, a 65B parameter LLaMa language model fine-tuned with the standard supervised loss on only 1,000 carefully curated prompts and responses, without any reinforcement learning or human preference modeling.
items.claim_text: LIMA是65B参数的LLaMa模型，仅用1000条精心挑选的样本进行监督微调，不使用强化学习或人类偏好建模 [EV-002]

items.original_text: In a controlled human study, responses from LIMA are either equivalent or strictly preferred to GPT-4 in 43% of cases; this statistic is as high as 58% when compared to Bard and 65% versus DaVinci003, which was trained with human feedback.
items.claim_text: 人类评估中，LIMA在43%的情况下与GPT-4相当或更优，对Bard为58%，对DaVinci003为65% [EV-003]

items.original_text: Taken together, these results strongly suggest that almost all knowledge in large language models is learned during pretraining, and only limited instruction tuning data is necessary to teach models to produce high quality output.
items.claim_text: 结果表明LLM几乎所有知识都在预训练阶段学习，指令微调只需少量数据即可教会模型生成高质量输出 [EV-004]

items.original_text: We define the Superficial Alignment Hypothesis: A model's knowledge and capabilities are learnt almost entirely during pretraining, while alignment teaches it which subdistribution of formats should be used when interacting with users.
items.claim_text: Superficial Alignment Hypothesis：模型知识在预训练中习得，对齐只教会模型使用格式子分布 [EV-005]

items.original_text: We curate a dataset of 1,000 prompts and responses, where the outputs (responses) are stylistically aligned with each other, but the inputs (prompts) are diverse. Specifically, we seek outputs in the style of a helpful AI assistant.
items.claim_text: 训练集包含1000个多样化提示和风格对齐的响应，采用AI助手风格 [EV-006]

items.original_text: We select 750 top questions and answers from community forums, such as Stack Exchange and wikiHow, sampling for quality and diversity. In addition, we manually write 250 examples of prompts and responses, while optimizing for task diversity and emphasizing a uniform response style in the spirit of an AI assistant.
items.claim_text: 数据来源：750个来自Stack Exchange和wikiHow的精选问答，加250个人工编写示例 [EV-007]

items.original_text: Ablation experiments reveal vastly diminishing returns when scaling up data quantity without also scaling up prompt diversity, alongside major gains when optimizing data quality.
items.claim_text: 消融实验表明：仅增加数据量而不增加多样性收益递减，优化数据质量则效果显著 [EV-008]

items.original_text: Despite training on 52 times more data, Alpaca 65B tends to produce less preferable outputs than LIMA. The same is true for DaVinci003, though to a lesser extent; what is striking about this result is the fact that DaVinci003 was trained with RLHF, a supposedly superior alignment method.
items.claim_text: Alpaca用52倍数据训练效果仍不及LIMA；DaVinci003虽用RLHF也不如LIMA [EV-009]

items.original_text: Analyzing LIMA responses on an absolute scale reveals that 88% meet the prompt requirements, and 50% are considered excellent.
items.claim_text: LIMA生成结果中88%满足prompt要求，50%被评定为优秀 [EV-010]

items.original_text: Despite having zero dialogue examples, we find that LIMA can conduct coherent multi-turn dialogue, and that this ability can be dramatically improved by adding only 30 hand-crafted dialogue chains to the training set.
items.claim_text: 零对话样本情况下LIMA仍能多轮对话；仅加30条手工对话链即可显著改善 [EV-011]

items.original_text: We respond safely to 80% of them (including 6 out of 10 prompts with malicious intent). In some cases, LIMA outright refuses to perform the task (e.g. when asked to provide a celebrity's address), but when the malicious intent is implicit, LIMA is more likely to provide unsafe responses.
items.claim_text: LIMA对80%的敏感prompt做出安全响应（包括10条恶意prompt中的6条）[EV-012]

items.original_text: Alpaca uses 52,000 auto-generated instruction-following examples to fine-tune LLaMA 7B.
items.claim_text: Alpaca使用52K自动生成样本微调LLaMA，数据量是LIMA的52倍 [EV-013]

items.original_text: InstructGPT proposes RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) as a three-stage process: SFT, RM, and PPO optimization to align language models with human preferences.
items.claim_text: InstructGPT提出RLHF三阶段流程：SFT、RM、PPO优化，用于对齐人类偏好 [EV-014]

items.original_text: Llama 2 shows that RLHF stage is essential for achieving best alignment quality; SFT alone is insufficient for optimal results.
items.claim_text: Llama 2显示RLHF阶段对最佳对齐效果必不可少；仅靠SFT无法达到最优 [EV-015]

items.original_text: Despite an up to 16-fold increase in data size, performance as measured by ChatGPT plateaus.
items.claim_text: 数据量增加16倍，ChatGPT评估的性能仍趋于平稳 [EV-016]
